task_completion.description: Verify that a page named 'Privacy Policy' has been created and published on the WordPress site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Privacy Policy' page in the WordPress 'Pages' list without a 'Draft' status, or a screenshot of the live published page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Privacy Policy page contains the required company name, email, and address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Horizon Digital Media', 'privacy@horizondm.com', and '742 Innovation Drive, San Francisco, CA 94105' within the page editor or the live page content.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Privacy Policy page is officially designated as the site's Privacy Policy in the system settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress 'Settings' -> 'Privacy' screen showing the 'Privacy Policy' page selected in the dropdown and set as the official privacy policy page.

task_completion.description: Verify that a page named 'Terms of Service' has been created and published on the WordPress site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Terms of Service' page in the WordPress 'Pages' list without a 'Draft' status, or a screenshot of the live published page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Terms of Service page contains the required company name, liability clause, and jurisdiction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Horizon Digital Media', 'Limitation of Liability', and 'State of California' within the page editor or the live page content.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Terms of Service page has substantive content of at least 300 characters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text volume in the editor or live page; it should be at least a few paragraphs or a substantial block of text, clearly exceeding a couple of short sentences.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to access the WordPress admin dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window showing the WordPress interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands (like WP-CLI or direct MySQL queries) to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the absence of terminal windows executing WordPress or database commands to create pages or change settings.

integrity.description: Verify the pages were actually created in WordPress, not just mocked up in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress page editor interface or the actual WordPress site frontend, not a local text editor like VS Code or Notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Company Name: Horizon Digital Media. Contact Email: privacy@horizondm.com. Address: 742 Innovation Drive, San Francisco, CA 94105. TOS Liability: Limitation of Liability. TOS Jurisdiction: State of California. TOS Minimum Length: 300 characters.
